esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Non-zero blocked processes means active blocking chains
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_blocked = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_blocked > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_blocked
